task_completion.description: The Markups module is active and a new point list named 'Anatomical_Landmarks' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Slicer GUI with the Markups module open and 'Anatomical_Landmarks' selected or visible in the list selector.

task_completion.description: Four fiducial markers are placed in the scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D view or slice views show four distinct markup points, or the Markups control panel lists 4 items.

task_completion.description: The fiducials are renamed to the specific anatomical labels: AC, PC, CC_Superior, Frontal_Apex.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Markups control panel table displays the names 'AC', 'PC', 'CC_Superior', and 'Frontal_Apex' in the label column.

task_completion.description: The agent interacts with the export functionality to save the landmarks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Export to file' section is expanded, or a 'Save Data' dialog is visible targeting 'landmarks.csv' in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/Exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: The final CSV file is verified to exist and contain the correct data structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer showing 'landmarks.csv' in the correct folder, or a text editor/terminal view displaying the file content with headers (label,r,a,s) and the four labeled rows.

integrity.description: The agent used the Slicer GUI to place landmarks rather than scripting the entire process without visual feedback.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the 3D or Slice views (crosshairs, mouse clicks) during the placement phase.

integrity.description: The CSV file was generated by Slicer, not manually created via terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not use 'echo' or text editors to manually type out the CSV content from scratch.

integrity.description: The agent did not paste a pre-computed set of coordinates or a solution script.
integrity.visual_evidence: No large blocks of coordinate data or complete solution scripts are pasted into the Python console.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a MarkupsFiducial list named 'Anatomical_Landmarks'. The four required landmarks are: 'AC', 'PC', 'CC_Superior', 'Frontal_Apex'. The output file must be named 'landmarks.csv' and saved in '~/Documents/SlicerData/Exports/'. The CSV must contain columns for the label and R, A, S coordinates.
